items.title: meetily
items.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.
items.description_zh: 隐私第一，AI 会议助手具有 4 倍快的 Parakeet/Whisper 实时转录、发言者分类和基于 Rust 构建的 Ollama 摘要。 100%本地加工。无需云。 Meetily（Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai）是适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的排名第一的自托管开源人工智能会议记录工具。

items.title: codex-plugin-cc
items.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
items.description_zh: 使用 Claude Code 的 Codex 来审查代码或委派任务。

items.title: system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.description_zh: 从 Anthropic 中提取的系统提示 - Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、Claude Code、Claude Design。 OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 思维、GPT 5.5 即时、Codex。 Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash、3.1 Pro、反重力。 xAI - Grok、Cursor、Copilot、VS Code、Perplexity 等。定期更新。

items.title: taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop
items.description_zh: 品味技能 - 给你的人工智能良好的品味。阻止人工智能产生无聊的、通用的斜坡

items.title: claude-skills
items.description: 337 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.
items.description_zh: 337 个 Claude Code 技能和代理技能和插件（30 多个代理、70 多个自定义命令、330 多个技能、可自定义参考、脚本），适用于 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI、Cursor 和另外 8 个编码代理 — 工程、营销、产品、合规性、C 级咨询、研究、业务运营、商业和财务以及您的日常生产力技能。

items.title: romm
items.description: A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.
items.description_zh: 一个美丽、强大、自托管的 ROM 管理器和播放器。

items.title: herdr
items.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
items.description_zh: 位于您终端中的代理多路复用器。

items.title: page-agent
items.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
items.description_zh: JavaScript 页内 GUI 代理。使用自然语言控制 Web 界面。

items.title: strix
items.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
items.description_zh: 开源人工智能渗透测试工具，用于查找并修复应用程序的漏洞。

items.title: awesome-claude-code
items.description: A hand-picked collection of the finest of resources for the most awesome of agents, Claude Code, the undisputed champion of coding companions, from the unstoppable team at Anthropic PBC. A delectable showcase of top tier skills, ambidextrous agents, scintillating status lines, top notch developer tooling, and also we have plugins
items.description_zh: 为最出色的特工 Claude Code 精心挑选的最优质资源，Claude Code 是无可争议的编码伙伴冠军，来自 Anthropic PBC 势不可挡的团队。顶级技能、灵巧的代理、闪烁的状态栏、一流的开发人员工具的令人愉快的展示，而且我们还有插件

items.title: marketingskills
items.description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.
items.description_zh: Claude Code 和 AI 代理的营销技巧。 CRO、文案、SEO、分析和增长工程。

items.title: caveman
items.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman
items.description_zh: 🪨 当很少的代币可以做戏时为什么要使用大量的代币 — Claude Code 技能通过像穴居人一样说话来减少 65% 的代币

items.title: unity-mcp
items.description: Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.
items.description_zh: Unity MCP 充当 AI 助手和 Unity 编辑器之间的桥梁。为您提供 LLM 工具来管理资源、控制场景、编辑脚本以及在 Unity 中自动执行任务。

items.title: astryx
items.description: An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready
items.description_zh: 完全可定制且可供代理使用的开源设计系统
